figures.caption: Table 1: SVR-MAD achieves the best cost-accuracy tradeoff across all evaluated settings. Evaluation results across two datasets and two LLMs. Arrows indicate whether higher (↑) or lower (↓) metric values are better. Best results are bold (NComm/Tok comparisons exclude Self Consistency, which is a no-debate reference).

Figure 1: SVR better identifies correct agents than prior signals under increasing difficulty. Percentage of problems where the top-ranked agent under each signal is correct, as a function of increasing difficulty.
